text: Alright ready? Set. Green light. Green light. Red light. Green light. Greenway. Red. And green. Red. And green. Go that way. Go the other way. Red! Red! Oh, you didn't stop. You went through the red light. Oh, no. Remember, focus, focus. Ready? Set. It's okay. Good job. Green light. Oh. Alright, I think we're done. Good job, Caleb. Good job, Callie.
